parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT e.user_id FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.first_seen < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);

SELECT e.dimension, e.text, e.persona, e.frequency, e.trend, e.funnel_stage, e.source_platform FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND e.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.first_seen < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY e.frequency DESC;

INSERT INTO research.market_pulse (user_id, report_month, title, content_json, content_md, top_pains, emerging_desires, language_shifts, criteria_shifts) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.report_month }}'::date, '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.content_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.top_pains }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.emerging_desires }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.language_shifts }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.criteria_shifts }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, report_month) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, top_pains = EXCLUDED.top_pains, emerging_desires = EXCLUDED.emerging_desires, language_shifts = EXCLUDED.language_shifts, criteria_shifts = EXCLUDED.criteria_shifts;
